title: nie-daemon API: POST /api/send (chat message)
description:
**What:** Implement POST /api/send { text } that serializes a ClearMessage::Chat, sends to relay via BROADCAST, and returns { message_id: UUID }.

**Algorithm:**
1. In daemon/src/api.rs:
2. #[derive(Deserialize)] struct SendRequest { text: String }
3. #[derive(Serialize)] struct SendResponse { message_id: String }
4. #[derive(Serialize)] struct ApiError { code: String, message: String }
5. async fn handle_send(State(state): State<DaemonState>, Json(req): Json<SendRequest>) -> Result<Json<SendResponse>, (StatusCode, Json<ApiError>)>:
   a. if req.text.is_empty(): return Err((400, ApiError{code:'invalid_request', message:'text must not be empty'}))
   b. const MAX_TEXT_BYTES: usize = 65536; if req.text.as_bytes().len() > MAX_TEXT_BYTES: return Err((413, ApiError{code:'payload_too_large',...}))
   c. msg_id = Uuid::new_v4()
   d. payload = serde_json::to_vec(&ClearMessage::Chat { text: req.text }) — unwrap() (derived Serialize cannot fail — add comment)
   e. from = state.my_pub_id().to_string()
   f. Build JsonRpcRequest::new(next_request_id(), BROADCAST, BroadcastParams { payload: payload, from }) — .unwrap() with comment
   g. state.relay_tx().send(req).await.map_err(|_| (503, ApiError{code:'relay_unavailable', message:'relay connection down'}))?
   h. Ok(Json(SendResponse { message_id: msg_id.to_string() }))
6. Register: .route('/api/send', post(handle_send))

**Defensive programming rules:**
- Validate text length BEFORE serializing to prevent allocation DoS
- relay_tx.send() Err → 503, not panic
- UUID returned as to_string() (hyphenated: 8-4-4-4-12 = 36 chars)
- Never log payload bytes (architecture invariant: payload is opaque)
- Never deserialize payload after construction

**Agent team:** Implementer. Validator.

**Tests (oracle: Uuid::to_string() produces exactly 36-char hyphenated lowercase string; defined by uuid crate docs):**
- test_send_empty_text: POST with text='' → 400 JSON with code='invalid_request'
- test_send_too_long: POST with text of 65537 bytes → 413
- test_send_ok_message_id_format: POST with text='hello' → 200, message_id.len()==36, message_id[8]=='-', message_id[13]=='-'
- test_send_relay_down: relay_tx closed → 503 with code='relay_unavailable'
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-daemon passes including all validation tests; cargo clippy -- -D warnings exits 0
close_reason: POST /api/send handler implemented; UUID format test passes
